name: Omar Al-Qaisi
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته يا عمر 👋 لاحظنا أنك حصلت على 59 في آخر اختبار وتحتاج فقط لنقاط قليلة للنجاح - أنت قريب جداً! 💪 معك 6 أيام قبل الاختبار القادم، هل تريد مساعدتي في المراجعة والاستعداد؟
action: Call or text Omar today to introduce yourself, acknowledge his strong attendance, review the topics from the failed quiz, and create a 6-day study plan together before the next assessment.
reasoning: Omar has perfect attendance but has never been contacted despite being at high risk with a below-passing quiz score (59/100). Early intervention now can leverage his demonstrated commitment and help him clear the passing threshold in just 6 days.
